sizing_rule.note: Fixed fractional position sizing tied to current equity; maximum drawdown tolerance scales proportionally with equity curve height. Maintains constant probability of ruin. Specific optimal_f and kelly_fraction values not disclosed by author.

source_rule_text: On a fixed fractional basis, position size increases with accumulated profits, but the maximum allowable drawdown from peak equity remains proportional to the current equity level, maintaining constant probability of ruin across all trades.
